violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Certified Food Safety Manager License Application was provided at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Deli meats sliced just prior to inspection were placed directly into the Sandwich prep unit for service prior to cooling back to 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below and observed at 54 to 56 degrees Fahrenheit. Sliced deli meats were moved to colder refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Beef, chicken, and hot dogs were observed thawing on the prep sink side counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Items were observed still thawing at time of observation. Food items placed under running water at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025

Clams, Mussels, and Oysters located in outdoor walk-in cooler did not have the proper identification tags. Tags were made available to inspector. Shellstock tags must remain with the container of shellstock until the container is empty and then mark with the last date of use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

Food contact surfaces of tomato slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was moved to the 3 Bay Sink for Proper Wash/Rinse/Sanitize at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

Several items on the menu can be served raw or undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2023

At the time of inspection, Reduced Oxygen Packaged Lobster was observed set in the Outdoor Walk-In Cooler for thawing, in its intact package, at the time of inspection. REDUCED OXYGEN PACKAGED FISH that bears a label indicating that it is to be kept frozen until time of use shall be removed from the reduced oxygen environment prior to its thawing under refrigeration. (Lobster packaging was sliced open at the time of inspection.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023
